dialogue.text: When I find myself in times of trouble Mother Mary
dialogue.zh: 當我在困難時刻，聖母瑪利亞
dialogue.ja: 困難な時に、マザー・メアリーが現れます
dialogue.local: When I find myself in times of trouble Mother Mary
dialogue.local_pron: When I find myself in times of trouble Mother Mary
dialogue.en: When I find myself in times of trouble Mother Mary
dialogue.en_pron: When I find myself in times of trouble Mother Mary

dialogue.text: comes to me
dialogue.zh: 來到我身邊
dialogue.ja: 私のところにやって来ます
dialogue.local: comes to me
dialogue.local_pron: comes to me
dialogue.en: comes to me
dialogue.en_pron: comes to me

dialogue.text: Speaking words of wisdom Let it be
dialogue.zh: 說出智慧的話語，讓它發生
dialogue.ja: 知恵の言葉を語りかけます、「そのままにしておきなさい」
dialogue.local: Speaking words of wisdom Let it be
dialogue.local_pron: Speaking words of wisdom Let it be
dialogue.en: Speaking words of wisdom Let it be
dialogue.en_pron: Speaking words of wisdom Let it be

dialogue.text: And in my hour of darkness She is standing right in front of me
dialogue.zh: 在我黑暗的時刻，她就站在我面前
dialogue.ja: 私が暗闇の中にいる時、彼女は私の目の前に立っています
dialogue.local: And in my hour of darkness She is standing right in front of me
dialogue.local_pron: And in my hour of darkness She is standing right in front of me
dialogue.en: And in my hour of darkness She is standing right in front of me
dialogue.en_pron: And in my hour of darkness She is standing right in front of me

dialogue.ja: 知恵の言葉を語りかけます、「そのままにしておきなさい」

dialogue.local_pron: Whisper words of wisdom Let it be

dialogue.en_pron: Whisper words of wisdom Let it be

dialogue.text: And when the broken hearted people living in the world agree
dialogue.zh: 當世界上傷心的人們達成共識時
dialogue.ja: 世界に生きる傷ついた人々が同意するとき
dialogue.local: And when the broken hearted people living in the world agree
dialogue.local_pron: And when the broken hearted people living in the world agree
dialogue.en: And when the broken hearted people living in the world agree
dialogue.en_pron: And when the broken hearted people living in the world agree

dialogue.text: There will be an answer, let it be
dialogue.zh: 會有答案，讓它發生
dialogue.ja: 答えがあるでしょう、そのままにしておきなさい
dialogue.local: There will be an answer, let it be
dialogue.local_pron: There will be an answer, let it be
dialogue.en: There will be an answer, let it be
dialogue.en_pron: There will be an answer, let it be

dialogue.text: But though there may be party There is still a chance that they will see
dialogue.zh: 即使可能有爭執，他們仍有機會看到
dialogue.ja: たとえ争いがあっても、彼らが見るチャンスはまだあります

dialogue.text: And when the night is cloudy There is still a light that shines on me

dialogue.ja: 夜が曇っていても、私を照らす光がまだある

dialogue.text: I wake up to the sound of music Mother Mary comes to me
